data.boss_ai_decision:

REASON: Once Caldas exhibits stronger xG (1.56) and PPG (1.77). However, 1X2 odds are tight, and critical odds for BTTS (70% potential) and O2.5 (39% potential) are absent. First Half Over 0.5 has the highest potential at 73%.
CONCLUSION: First Half Over 0.5.
